steps.title: Spot the variation principle
steps.content: The passage says the sounds “can differ based on the distance between the ridges, the types of strokes, and the thickness of the gourd.” This is the explanation for what the sounds are like.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the blank
steps.content: “Variable” captures this: the sounds are changeable based on conditions. The other three—“overlooked,” “routine,” and “powerful”—don't address how the sounds vary depending on multiple factors. That matches choice D — D is correct.
